title: update-input
description: Discriminated-union schema for the 8 deterministic write-ops in executing-plans/scripts/. Each script dispatches by filename, so the 'op' field is implicit (matched against the script name). The schema documents the per-op input shape so agents have one canonical reference.

oneOf.title: run-step
oneOf.description: Bundled start + shell exec + complete/fail with AUTO-CAPTURED log_context. Preferred path for COMMAND/CODE/TEST steps — eliminates the 'forgot to pass log_context' footgun. Exits with the wrapped command's true exit code; auto-fail-step on non-zero. Output truncated to 16 KiB (head 8 KiB + marker + tail 8 KiB).

command.description: Passed verbatim to `bash -c $command`. Heredocs/pipes/&&/|| all allowed.

summary.description: Optional ONE-line curated summary. Defaults to 'run-step: <command-truncated-80>'.

allow_nonzero.description: Reserved for future use. v1 must be false or absent — non-zero always auto-fail-steps.

oneOf.title: start-step
oneOf.description: PENDING → IN_PROGRESS. Optionally sets step_type, agent_input, and inline log_context (e.g. process launch banner).

agent_input.description: Required when type=SUB_AGENT — the verbatim prompt sent to the delegated agent

log_context.description: Optional initial log entry (e.g. launch banner, kickoff timestamp). Same format as append-log.

oneOf.title: complete-step
oneOf.description: IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED. Optionally records summary, agent_output, and inline log_context (raw shell/tool output — same path as append-log).

summary.description: ONE human-curated sentence describing what was done. Distinct from log_context.

agent_output.description: Required when this step had type=SUB_AGENT — the agent's response

log_context.description: Optional raw output (shell stdout, test output, tool log). Appended to Steps.log_context with `--- ts ---` delimiter — same format as append-log.sh. Use this INSTEAD OF a separate append-log call when you have the output ready at completion time.

oneOf.title: fail-step
oneOf.description: * → FAILED. Reason appended to log_context. Optional inline log_context for the failure output (highly recommended — explains WHY).

log_context.description: Optional raw failure output (stack trace, error log). Strongly recommended for failures — the dashboard shows it in the step's log panel.

oneOf.title: append-log
oneOf.description: Append raw machine output to Steps.log_context (auto-truncated). No status transition.

text.description: Raw output to append. Telemetry truncates to last ~50 lines / ~1000 tokens.

oneOf.title: deviate
oneOf.description: Mid-flight plan revision. Inserts new sub-steps under parent + increments revision_count. Circuit breakers: revision_count ≤ max_revisions, depth ≤ 3.

justification.description: Why the plan needed to change. Logged for audit.

oneOf.title: record-skill
oneOf.description: INSERT into SkillActivations. Use for skills loaded mid-flight (source typically 'deferred-load'). For init-time skills, use writing-plans/publish-plan.sh's skills[] array instead.

step_id.description: Optional — anchor activation to the step where it surfaced

reason.description: Optional — short note on what triggered the activation

oneOf.title: finish-plan
oneOf.description: IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED at the plan level. Idempotent: rejects already-COMPLETED plans.
